summary.title: Telemetry: standardized buildDate and added locale/timeZone
changes: Telemetry now records the device system locale and time zone.
Telemetry's buildDate is now emitted as YYYY-MM-DD in UTC instead of a localized text string.
Telemetry now includes an appName field set to Trio to help distinguish forks.
The privacy policy was updated to document the added locale and time zone fields and the policy date.
